inputs.label: Length (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The length of the plate in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of the plate in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Länge der Platte in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur de la plaque en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud de la placa en milímetros.

inputs.label: Width (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The width of the plate in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of the plate in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Breite der Platte in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La largeur de la plaque en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la placa en milímetros.

inputs.label: Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The thickness of the plate in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The thickness of the plate in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dicke der Platte in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'épaisseur de la plaque en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor de la placa en milímetros.

inputs.label: Material Density (kg/m³)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the plate material in kilograms per cubic meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the plate material in kilograms per cubic meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Plaka malzemesinin metreküp başına kilogram cinsinden yoğunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Plattenmaterials in Kilogramm pro Kubikmeter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau de la plaque en kilogrammes par mètre cube.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del material de la placa en kilogramos por metro cúbico.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of the material per kilogram in local currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost of the material per kilogram in local currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin kilogram başına birim maliyeti (yerel para birimi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Stückkosten des Materials pro Kilogramm in lokaler Währung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire du matériau par kilogramme en devise locale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo unitario del material por kilogramo en moneda local.

inputs.label: Manufacturing Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage overhead applied to material cost to cover manufacturing, labor, and other indirect costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage overhead applied to material cost to cover manufacturing, labor, and other indirect costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme maliyetine uygulanan ve üretim, işçilik ve diğer dolaylı maliyetleri karşılayan yüzde oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentualer Zuschlag auf Materialkosten zur Deckung von Fertigungs-, Lohn- und anderen indirekten Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de frais généraux appliqué au coût matière pour couvrir la fabrication, la main-d'œuvre et autres coûts indirects.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de gastos generales aplicado al costo del material para cubrir fabricación, mano de obra y otros costos indirectos.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material expected to be wasted due to offcuts or defects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of material expected to be wasted due to offcuts or defects.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim artıkları veya kusurlar nedeniyle israf edilmesi beklenen malzeme yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des erwarteten Materialabfalls durch Verschnitt oder Fehler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matière attendu comme perte (chutes ou défauts).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de material que se espera desperdiciar debido a recortes o defectos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
